titleStmt.title: SII 11.161: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 161. (B.K. No. 130 of 1926-27.) KŌṬAVUMACHIGI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ŚŌMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Pushya, śu. [4, Tuesday], Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1112, December 24, Tuesday. It mentions a certain Vāmanārya and the village Umachige.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namasu ngaśiraścumbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire .
śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 37 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsa
radapuṣya su 4 maṁgaḷavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti
vyatīpāta puṇyadinadoḷu svasti yamaniya
mādiviśēṣō vākya ra
caḷitadhairyya rvvimaḷacarita rllōkōttama rāśri
takaḷpavṛkṣarakṣa puṇyar . Ene negardu
macigeya ya mukhyarose
dīya lsarvvanamasya navadyaṁ vāmanā
ryya nacaḷita śāsanamaṁ kaḍe
yisi tāṁ baḍavane kubē
ranārige yanārjjisida rāradiṁtu kṛ
tārtthar . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāḥ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . vāmanayyanā
yaka biṭṭa dharmma maṁgaḷamahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 11.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
